data.title: Optional human review steps, configurable by project
data.description: Add optional human review checkpoints to DSO workflows (sprint, commit, preplanning, implementation-plan, etc.) that can be enabled or disabled per project via dso-config.conf. When enabled, the workflow pauses and presents work for human review before proceeding. This allows teams to tune their level of human oversight — from fully autonomous to human-in-the-loop at key decision points — based on their comfort level and risk tolerance.
